name: Rin Kawahara | TENTACLES 101
description:
"I swear they have a mind of their own."

Rin's tentacles like you. A lot.

══════════════════════════════════════

Rin's tentacles have opinions about you. Very strong ones.

The first scenario is more fluffy: you’re studying together in his dorm, Rin is relaxed, and his tentacles start getting… cute. The second is more smutty, with his tentacles getting a little handsy mid-makeout. In both cases, Rin gets a little embarrassed.

This alt assumes you haven’t really seen his tentacles before.

Content warnings: None, really. Just… tentacles.
